order: Context triage resolves AGENTS.MD invariants before the local-first procedural instruction layer; a present invalid local instruction blocks.

purpose: Read AGENTS.MD, repository context, branch state, dirty worktree, relevant synchronized documents, and optional Git-ignored local memory only when present before proposing changes.

Prove implemented behavior with same-range parent-authority synchronization, structure checks, environment-honest isolation evidence, aggregate checks, full hooks, and PR CI before merge; never bypass a rejected document range or unavailable prerequisite.
